title: The InputShape parameter should not be specified for TFKerasModel subclasses
description: This rule checks if the InputShape parameter is specified in TFKerasModel subclasses. It is recommended to use the `input_shape` attribute instead.
message: Avoid specifying the InputShape parameter in TFKerasModel subclasses.

noncompliant.description: Specifying InputShape parameter in the constructor.

why_is_this_an_issue: Specifying the InputShape parameter in the constructor makes the code less flexible and harder to maintain.
how_to_fix: Change the constructor to use the `input_shape` attribute and adjust the code accordingly.

metadata.title: The InputShape parameter should not be specified for TFKerasModel subclasses
